creator: ports@grosbein.net
text:
On Sun, Sep 04, 2011 at 12:53:30PM +0000, eadler@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [patch] Fix distfile sources for port net/AquaGatekeeper2
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: eadler
> State-Changed-When: Sun Sep 4 12:53:29 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Aqua Gatekeeper is discontinued by its vendor.

That's true but that's not reason to not fix my port.
The software still runs fine. Please reopen the PR
and give this maintainer update a chance to be processed.

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=160273

Eugene Grosbein
